title: Animated GIF resizing on mobile
excerpt:
Heya, working on optimising a site for mobile however an animated GIF stretches in mobile version and not sure why, as it’s not attempting to resize or correct itself. 
 
 
Anyone have any ideas how to correct this? Many…

posts.author: BenWilkie42 (Ben Wilkie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Heya, working on optimising a site for mobile however an animated GIF stretches in mobile version and not sure why, as it’s not attempting to resize or correct itself.


640×759 301 KB

Anyone have any ideas how to correct this? Many thanks.

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @BenWilkie42, thanks for posting! Just to clarify, is this on monday.com? If so, could you let me know where on monday.com you’re posting this GIF in order to resize it? I’d love to see what I can do to help.
